column6: Endpoint returns order data without Authorization header
Unauthenticated user can access order details and payment information by changing order ID
Endpoint returns 404 and user-not-found message instead of 401 Unauthorized for missing or invalid JWT
Empty OTP validation request triggers HTTP 500 instead of controlled client error
Invalid OTP validation request triggers HTTP 500 instead of controlled client error
Invalid token-based login request returns HTTP 500 with Invalid Credentials instead of a controlled authentication error
Missing report_id parameter triggers HTTP 500 instead of controlled client error
